properties.address: 1008 WILLIAMS MILL RD NE, ATLANTA GA 30306
properties.tree_description:
This tree has been a source of great anxiety for our family as branches keep snapping off and falling into the area that our toddler plays in every day. You can even see in the photo some of the broken limbs that haven't fallen yet, but larger branches than shown have fallen at regular intervals. The larger tree next to it also concerns us, especially during storms, as it's huge branches hang over our baby's nursery and our own bed. I adore our city's tree cover, and am greatly saddened to consider removing any tree, but my baby's safety is obviously top priority. I plan to plant at LEAST 4 trees over the next year in our backyard farther around the perimeter of the lot and would be happy to send the city photos of the new trees to eventually replace the dangerous trees so close to the home.Reason for Removal:Other
